title: Subagent Delegation UI — @general mentions in desktop composer
consumer_purpose: Allow desktop users to mention @general (and other subagents) in the composer prompt with visual distinction from regular agents
claim_atoms: Typing @ in the composer shows agent options including general (and other subagents)
Selecting a @general creates a pill showing the agent name in the editor
The pill is rendered as a DOM element (like @file pills) and persists in the prompt
On submit, the agent part is included in buildRequestParts output
Agent list for @mentions follows the correct filter pipeline
i18n keys added for agent labels
Zero regressions on existing @file and @agent mentions
content: # Plan: Subagent Delegation UI — @general mentions in desktop composer ## Root Causes **SG-001 (visual gap)**: The @mention popover already includes subagents in the agent list (filter: `mode !== "primary"`), but there is no visual distinction between regular agents and subagent delegation targets. Both render with the same `brain` icon. **SG-002 (type gap)**: The `AtOption` type supports `{type: "agent" | "file"}`. Subagents are shoehorned into `type: "agent"`. Adding `type: "delegate"` enables distinct rendering. **Critical oversight SG-002-b (selection handler gap)**: `handleAtSelect` only branches on `option.type === "agent"` vs `else`. A `type: "delegate"` AtOption would fall to the `else` branch and crash on `option.path` (undefined on delegates). **Critical oversight SG-002-c (groupBy gap)**: `useFilteredList`'s `groupBy` only handles `type: "agent"` and `recent` — delegates would fall through to `return "file"`, placing them at the bottom of the popover. ## Changeset (5 edits, 2 files) ### Fix A: Extend AtOption type (slash-popover.tsx:6) **Before**: ```ts export type AtOption = | { type: "agent"; name: string; display: string } | { type: "file"; path: string; display: string; recent?: boolean } ``` **After**: ```ts export type AtOption = | { type: "agent"; name: string; display: string } | { type: "delegate"; name: string; display: string; description?: string } | { type: "file"; path: string; display: string; recent?: boolean } ``` ### Fix B: Add delegate rendering in PromptPopover (slash-popover.tsx ~line 69) Add a delegate rendering branch inside ``, between the agent branch and the file rendering. **Insert after the agent rendering block (after line ~88)**: ```tsx if (item.type === "delegate") { return ( ) } ``` > Note: Using `bot` icon instead of `user` — `user` might not exist in the icon set. The `bot` icon is commonly available and appropriate for agents. ### Fix C: Map subagents to delegate type (prompt-input.tsx:584-588) **Before**: ```ts const agentList = createMemo(() => sync.data.agent .filter((agent) => !agent.hidden && agent.mode !== "primary") .map((agent): AtOption => ({ type: "agent", name: agent.name, display: agent.name })), ) ``` **After**: ```ts const agentList = createMemo(() => sync.data.agent .filter((agent) => !agent.hidden && agent.mode !== "primary") .map((agent): AtOption => agent.mode === "subagent" ? { type: "delegate", name: agent.name, display: agent.name, description: agent.description } : { type: "agent", name: agent.name, display: agent.name }), ) ``` ### Fix D: Add delegate key to atKey (prompt-input.tsx:600-603) **Before**: ```ts const atKey = (x: AtOption | undefined) => { if (!x) return "" return x.type === "agent" ? `agent:${x.name}` : `file:${x.path}` } ``` **After**: ```ts const atKey = (x: AtOption | undefined) => { if (!x) return "" if (x.type === "agent") return `agent:${x.name}` if (x.type === "delegate") return `delegate:${x.name}` return `file:${x.path}` } ``` ### Fix E: Handle delegate in handleAtSelect (prompt-input.tsx:591-597) **Before**: ```ts const handleAtSelect = (option: AtOption | undefined) => { if (!option) return if (option.type === "agent") { addPart({ type: "agent", name: option.name, content: "@" + option.name, start: 0, end: 0 }) } else { addPart({ type: "file", path: option.path, content: "@" + option.path, start: 0, end: 0 }) } } ``` **After**: ```ts const handleAtSelect = (option: AtOption | undefined) => { if (!option) return if (option.type === "agent" || option.type === "delegate") { addPart({ type: "agent", name: option.name, content: "@" + option.name, start: 0, end: 0 }) } else { addPart({ type: "file", path: option.path, content: "@" + option.path, start: 0, end: 0 }) } } ``` ### Fix F: Handle delegate in groupBy (prompt-input.tsx:626-637) **Before**: ```ts groupBy: (item) => { if (item.type === "agent") return "agent" if (item.recent) return "recent" return "file" }, sortGroupsBy: (a, b) => { const rank = (category: string) => { if (category === "agent") return 0 if (category === "recent") return 1 return 2 } return rank(a.category) - rank(b.category) }, ``` **After**: ```ts groupBy: (item) => { if (item.type === "agent" || item.type === "delegate") return "agent" if (item.recent) return "recent" return "file" }, sortGroupsBy: (a, b) => { const rank = (category: string) => { if (category === "agent") return 0 if (category === "recent") return 1 return 2 } return rank(a.category) - rank(b.category) }, ``` > Delegates are grouped under "agent" so they appear alongside regular agents in the popover. ## Impact Assessment ### Files changed (2 files only) 1. `packages/app/src/components/prompt-input/slash-popover.tsx` — Fix A + B 2. `packages/app/src/components/prompt-input.tsx` — Fix C, D, E, F ### No changes to: - `context/prompt.tsx` — ContentPart union unchanged - `prompt-input/build-request-parts.ts` — already handles AgentPart - `context/local.tsx` — composer dropdown filter unchanged (correctly excludes subagents) - `prompt-input/submit.tsx` — unchanged - `createPill` — unchanged (handles `type: "agent"` via same code path) - `parseFromDOM/pushAgent` — unchanged (reads `data-type="agent"` back) - `addPart` — unchanged (handles `type: "agent"` pill creation) ## Risks 1. **Icon name `bot` may not exist**: Alternative: `chat`, `message-square`, `corner-down-right`, or reuse `brain` with a different `class` for color differentiation. Verify in the Icon component's icon set before finalizing. 2. **atKey collision**: Not a practical risk — agent names are unique in sync.data.agent. 3. **Backwards compat**: All existing @mentions create `type: "agent"` ContentPart — no regressions. ## Validation 1. `bun typecheck` in `packages/app` — must pass 2. Manual test: Type @ in composer, confirm subagents (general, etc.) appear with different icon 3. Manual test: Select @general, confirm pill created with @general text 4. Manual test: Submit prompt with @general, inspect request payload for correct agent part 5. Manual test: @file mentions still work 6. Manual test: @agent mentions still work 7. Manual test: Popover grouping — delegates appear alongside agents, not with files
revision_notes: Added Fix E (handleAtSelect handles delegate) and Fix F (groupBy handles delegate). Changed suggested icon from 'user' to 'bot' for better cross-referencing. These fix the two blocking defects found during root cause analysis review.
